evals.prompt: Refresh the Schoolars Hub homepage so it feels more branded around the coaching-centre logo while staying parent-friendly on mobile.
evals.expected_output: A homepage update that uses the logo more intentionally, preserves readability, and keeps the inquiry flow prominent.

evals.prompt: Improve the Schoolars Hub payments page so parents understand the plans and next steps before paying.
evals.expected_output: A clearer fee-comparison and payment-confirmation experience with stronger trust signals and easy-to-scan mobile layout.

evals.prompt: Strengthen the Schoolars Hub inquiry experience without weakening backend safety.
evals.expected_output: A UI and backend-aware change that keeps client validation, server validation, and safe public submission patterns aligned.
